category: fused_reduction (topk + softmax + masked gather for MoE expert routing)
torch_pattern:
topk_values, topk_indices = torch.topk(gate_logits, {K}, dim=-1)
topk_values = topk_values + topE_mask
mask = (topk_indices == 0).to(gate_logits.dtype)
weights = torch.sum(torch.softmax(topk_values, dim=-1) * mask, dim=-1, keepdim=True)

config_template.notes: topk requires min last-dim of 64; expert dim must be padded with -inf mask (expert_mask) before/into the op. k=32 used at call site even though only top-2 experts are selected (mask zeroes the rest).

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_site unfused branch: topk_values, topk_indices = ttnn.topk(gate_logits_1SB8, 32); topk_values = ttnn.add(topk_values, self.top2_mask_11BB); mask_B2 = ttnn.eqz(topk_indices); mask_B2 = ttnn.typecast(mask_B2, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16); weights_1SB1 = ttnn.sum(ttnn.softmax(topk_values, dim=-1) * mask_B2, dim=3, keepdim=True); constraints: {'layout': 'TILE', 'min_topk_width': 64, 'reduction_dim': -1, 'keepdim': True}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, S, B, 8] padded to width 64 (decode-mode activations, small S)
placement_observations.source: call_site: 'if mode == Mode.DECODE: weights_1SB1 = ttnn.moe(gate_logits_1SB8, self.top8_mask_11B_64, self.top2_mask_11BB, 32)' — no explicit memory_config; fused path gated on decode mode only
test_example: 'ttnn.from_torch(expert_mask, dtype, layout=ttnn.Layout.TILE, device=device)' — TILE layout explicit, buffer type not specified
